title: OTel Traces Explorer
description: Explore OpenTelemetry traces with service topology, per-service drill-downs, and trace search. Click services, operations, or TraceIds to navigate.

list.name: Deployments (service.version)
list.rawQuery:
SELECT
  time,
  ServiceName AS tags,
  concat(ServiceName, ' deployed ', version, if(prev_version != '', concat(' (was ', prev_version, ')'), '')) AS text,
  'Deployment' AS title
FROM (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL 30 second) AS time,
    ServiceName,
    any(ResourceAttributes['service.version']) AS version,
    lagInFrame(any(ResourceAttributes['service.version']))
      OVER (PARTITION BY ServiceName ORDER BY time) AS prev_version
  FROM otel_traces
  WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
    AND ResourceAttributes['service.version'] != ''
  GROUP BY ServiceName, time
  ORDER BY ServiceName, time
)
WHERE prev_version != '' AND prev_version != version
ORDER BY time

target.rawSql:
SELECT
  time,
  ServiceName AS tags,
  concat(ServiceName, ' deployed ', version, if(prev_version != '', concat(' (was ', prev_version, ')'), '')) AS text,
  'Deployment' AS title
FROM (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL 30 second) AS time,
    ServiceName,
    any(ResourceAttributes['service.version']) AS version,
    lagInFrame(any(ResourceAttributes['service.version']))
      OVER (PARTITION BY ServiceName ORDER BY time) AS prev_version
  FROM otel_traces
  WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
    AND ResourceAttributes['service.version'] != ''
  GROUP BY ServiceName, time
  ORDER BY ServiceName, time
)
WHERE prev_version != '' AND prev_version != version
ORDER BY time

list.definition: SELECT ServiceName FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) GROUP BY ServiceName ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 10

list.name: service

query.rawSql: SELECT ServiceName FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) GROUP BY ServiceName ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 10

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT SpanName FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(ServiceName IN ($service), $service) ORDER BY SpanName LIMIT 200
list.label: Operation
list.name: operation

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT SpanName FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(ServiceName IN ($service), $service) ORDER BY SpanName LIMIT 200
SELECT DISTINCT StatusCode FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) ORDER BY StatusCode

list.description: Filter to traces lasting at least this many milliseconds. Leave blank for no minimum.
list.label: Min Duration (ms)
list.name: min_duration

list.description: Free-text search applied to SpanName (operation) on every trace panel. Use the Traces Explorer's Status filter for error-only views. Leave blank to disable.
list.label: Search
list.name: search

panels.description: Cross-service call graph from parent-child span joins. Edge counts are calls between services; node arcs show success vs error fraction. Limited to top 30 services and top 50 edges.
panels.title: Service Map

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ServiceName AS id,
  ServiceName AS title,
  concat(toString(count()), ' spans') AS mainstat,
  concat(toString(round(avg(Duration) / 1000000, 1)), ' ms avg') AS secondarystat,
  (count() - countIf(StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR'))) / count() AS arc__success,
  countIf(StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR')) / count() AS arc__errors
FROM otel_traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
GROUP BY ServiceName
ORDER BY count() DESC
LIMIT 30

SELECT
  concat(parent.ServiceName, '-', child.ServiceName) AS id,
  parent.ServiceName AS source,
  child.ServiceName AS target,
  concat(toString(count()), ' calls') AS mainstat
FROM otel_traces AS child
INNER JOIN otel_traces AS parent
  ON child.ParentSpanId = parent.SpanId
  AND child.TraceId = parent.TraceId
WHERE $__timeFilter(child.Timestamp)
  AND $__timeFilter(parent.Timestamp)
  AND parent.ServiceName != child.ServiceName
GROUP BY source, target
ORDER BY count() DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.description: Recent traces matching the variable filters. Click a TraceId to view the trace; click a Service to open the Service Dashboard; click an Operation to filter this view.
panels.title: Trace Search Results

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TraceId,
  any(ServiceName) AS Service,
  any(SpanName) AS RootOperation,
  min(Timestamp) AS Time,
  max(Duration) AS Duration,
  count() AS Spans,
  anyIf(StatusCode, StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR')) AS Status
FROM otel_traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
  AND $__conditionalAll(ServiceName IN ($service), $service)
  AND $__conditionalAll(SpanName IN ($operation), $operation)
  AND $__conditionalAll(StatusCode IN ($status), $status)
  AND $__conditionalAll(hasToken(SpanName, '$search'), $search)
GROUP BY TraceId
HAVING $__conditionalAll(max(Duration) >= toUInt64($min_duration) * 1000000, $min_duration)
ORDER BY Time DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.description: Span duration distribution over time for $service, log-scale. Sampled at 1-in-500 spans for performance. Use Open in Explore to refine the query.

links.title: Open in Explore
links.url: /explore?orgId=1&left={"datasource":"${datasource}","queries":[{"datasource":{"type":"grafana-clickhouse-datasource","uid":"${datasource}"},"editorType":"sql","rawSql":"SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL \$__interval_s second) AS time, Duration / 1000000 AS duration_ms FROM otel_traces WHERE \$__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' AND cityHash64(SpanId) % 500 = 0 ORDER BY time","refId":"A","format":0}],"range":{"from":"${__from}","to":"${__to}"}}

panels.title: Duration Distribution

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL $__interval_s second) AS time,
  Duration / 1000000 AS duration_ms
FROM otel_traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
  AND ServiceName IN (${service:singlequote}) AND $__conditionalAll(hasToken(SpanName, '$search'), $search)
  AND cityHash64(SpanId) % 500 = 0
ORDER BY time

links.url: /explore?orgId=1&left={"datasource":"${datasource}","queries":[{"datasource":{"type":"grafana-clickhouse-datasource","uid":"${datasource}"},"editorType":"sql","rawSql":"SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL \$__interval_s second) AS time, quantile(0.99)(Duration) / 1000000 AS p99_ms FROM otel_traces WHERE \$__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time","refId":"A","format":0}],"range":{"from":"${__from}","to":"${__to}"}}

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL $__interval_s second) AS time,
  quantile(0.99)(Duration) / 1000000 AS p99_ms
FROM otel_traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
  AND ServiceName IN (${service:singlequote}) AND $__conditionalAll(hasToken(SpanName, '$search'), $search)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

panels.description: Operations for $service ranked by call count. Errors and Error % are colour-coded; click an operation to filter the dashboard. Use Open in Explore to refine the query.

links.title: Open in Explore
links.url: /explore?orgId=1&left={"datasource":"${datasource}","queries":[{"datasource":{"type":"grafana-clickhouse-datasource","uid":"${datasource}"},"editorType":"sql","rawSql":"SELECT SpanName AS Operation, count() AS Count, countIf(StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR')) AS Errors, round(countIf(StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR')) / count() * 100, 2) AS \"Error %\", quantile(0.5)(Duration) AS P50, quantile(0.99)(Duration) AS P99 FROM otel_traces WHERE \$__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' GROUP BY Operation ORDER BY Count DESC LIMIT 50","refId":"A","format":1}],"range":{"from":"${__from}","to":"${__to}"}}

panels.title: Top Operations

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  SpanName AS Operation,
  count() AS Count,
  countIf(StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR')) AS Errors,
  round(countIf(StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR')) / count() * 100, 2) AS "Error %",
  quantile(0.5)(Duration) AS P50,
  quantile(0.99)(Duration) AS P99,
  anyIf(if(StatusMessage != '', StatusMessage, SpanAttributes['http.status_code']), StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR')) AS "Top Error"
FROM otel_traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
  AND ServiceName IN (${service:singlequote}) AND $__conditionalAll(hasToken(SpanName, '$search'), $search)
GROUP BY Operation
ORDER BY Count DESC
LIMIT 15
